case_title: DIGITAL ONE LEGAL VS. PROMETHEUS PARTNERS, LLP.

REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF DIGITAL ONE LEGAL
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,553.62 FILED BY DIGITAL ONE LEGAL AS TO DEFENDANT PROMETHEUS PARTNERS, LLP. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-31-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE: $40.00) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DIGITAL ONE LEGAL AS TO DEFENDANT PROMETHEUS PARTNERS, LLP.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OR DEFENDANT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
